title: Data Center Deals to Top $100B: EQT's Vesely
description:
Jan Vesely, partner at global private equity firm EQT, talks with Bloomberg's Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals". They discuss AI infrastructure as demand is forecast to require more than $3 trillion in data center investment, including related power supplies, according to estimates from Morgan Stanley and Moody’s Ratings.  
 (Source: Bloomberg)
